title: tephrosia leucantha
intro: Tephrosia leucantha, also known as the White Horsefly Bush, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia leucantha include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce inflammation. Tephrosia leucantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various health issues, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
